title: Link's Sloppy Disco Party
description:
because colin wuzn't invited

apparently only the door attended Link's party; the lizalfos is classified as a stalker

yes, he's stalking the door

also, can anyone tell me when the lizalfos bought color-changing eyes?

Fun fact: Did you know that there were 4 prototypes for this video, with 4 different possible music selections?

(sadly this is what I was talking about FLM. 
this video's filler
and simply put it's just switching audio
how low can I go I never know moe)
